def positive_atomic_replace_semantics_implemented_with_non_atomic_file_write():
    rule_id = "atomic_replace_semantics_implemented_with_non_atomic_file_write"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag code that intends atomic replacement but uses non-atomic file writes."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
